why_it_matters: Legato 1.0.0 marks the first stable, Capacitor-first release of the project with published npm/Maven/iOS artifacts, validated consumer flows, explicit API docs, and governed release communication.
user_impact: Consumers and maintainers now have a stable 1.0.0 baseline for Capacitor integration with clear support boundaries and durable release history.
upgrade_notes: Use @ddgutierrezc/legato-contract@1.0.0 and @ddgutierrezc/legato-capacitor@1.0.0. Refresh native hosts so Android uses legato-android-core:1.0.0 and iOS uses LegatoCore v1.0.0.
breaking_changes: None beyond the explicit 1.0.0 support boundary: non-Capacitor adapters, advanced DRM/auth refresh, and deep post-lifecycle restore remain out of scope for this release.
highlights: Published and validated artifacts across npm, Maven Central, and iOS distribution.
Durable changelog and release communication governance in place.
known_limitations: Flutter and React Native remain future milestones.
Advanced DRM, token refresh, process-death restore, and OEM-wide deep hardening remain post-1.0 work.
